wins: Revenue and EPS both exceeded consensus estimates
Data Center segment revenue increased 57% year-over-year
Client & Gaming segment revenue increased 28% year-over-year
Strong growth in AI accelerator, EPYC and Ryzen CPU sales
Significant expansion of gross margin year-over-year
risks: Export controls for Instinct MI308X shipments to China
Sequential decline in Data Center segment revenue
Inventory levels increased due to ZT Systems acquisition
